name: Inmate to Roommate
overview: Follows recently released inmates as they re-enter society and move in with everyday people who welcome them into their homes. America has one of the world’s highest recidivism rates with approximately 76% of released prisoners being re-arrested after 5 years. One of the most significant factors in reducing recidivism rates is access to housing. Both the former inmates and their respective roommates will enter this this new living arrangement with their own baggage.

trailers.title: New series “Inmate to Roommate” premieres Thursday, August 18 at 10pm ET/PT
